title: Knaspack Vanilj
description: Great graphics, incredible performance and some QoL features for a improved but still Vanilla-esque experience!
body:
A Vanilla-esque modpack with focus on performance and graphics enhancements as well as QoL features for an experience that is _slightly_ more than just Vanilla!


The pack gets its graphics and performance base from [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) to be a great improvement to the normal game and never have to wonder how to increase your FPS, since it'll always be high.

The pack also have some fun additions to personalize it with slightly higher QoL and QoE. With mods like **Simply Voice Chat** to speak to your friends with proximity Voice Chat ingame, **Sound Physics Remastered** to make all sounds _-including the voice chat-_ take the environment into consideration and **Distant Horizons** to see further than ever before, one can expect a spectacular experience together with friends!


The pack should be playable on any vanilla server without issues. But for the best experience, the server should at least have the same mods as the pack for the players to really get a great experience!

The purpose of the pack is to be used on my private server with friends, but of course if the pack also tickles your fancy, feel free to use it for whatever you want!
